CustomField.description: JSON configuration for conditional cell coloring rules
CustomField.inlineHelpText: JSON array defining cell coloring. Each object has: field (API name), rules (array of {values, background, color}), default ({background, color}). Values use picklist API values. Example: [{"field":"RegistrationStatus__c","rules":[{"values":["REG"],"background":"#c8e6c9","color":"#1b5e20"}]}]
CustomField.label: Cell Styles
